 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-r7k","title":"Implement core package unit tests (packages/core/__tests__)","description":"**Details:**
- Test prompt registry: getPrompt, getPromptsByCategory, getPromptsByTag
- Test BM25 search: relevance, boosting, synonym expansion
- Test template renderer: variable substitution, defaults, edge cases
- Test export functions: SKILL.md generation, markdown export, JSON payload
- Test bundle/workflow logic: getBundlePrompts, generateBundleSkillMd
- Test schema validation: valid prompts pass, invalid prompts fail with clear errors

**Framework:** Vitest with happy-dom

**Coverage Target:** 90%+ for all exported functions

**Test Organization:**
```
packages/core/__tests__/
  prompts/
    registry.test.ts
    types.test.ts (type guards)
  search/
    bm25.test.ts
    tokenize.test.ts
    synonyms.test.ts
  export/
    skills.test.ts
    markdown.test.ts
    json.test.ts
  template/
    render.test.ts
```

**Reasoning:** Core package is imported by both web and CLI - bugs here propagate everywhere. Comprehensive tests ensure registry integrity, search quality, and export correctness.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:32:06.647470174-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T02:15:14.842971466-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T02:15:14.842971466-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented core package unit tests: (1) Registry tests - prompts, categories, getPrompt, getPromptsByCategory/Tag, searchPromptsByText, (2) BM25 tests - buildIndex, search, boosting, (3) Tokenize tests - tokenize, tokenizeRaw, ngrams, STOPWORDS, (4) Export tests - generateSkillMd, generateInstallScript, generateSkillEntries, computeSkillHash, createManifestEntry. 73 tests pass. Added test script to package.json.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-r7k","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-ves","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:38:08.552583152-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

-{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-rbke","title":"E2E Tests: Help Center & Support","description":"## Origin
Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-xwg2.

## Task
Create E2E tests for help center and support functionality.

## Test Scenarios

### Help Center
1. Help center page loads
2. FAQ categories display
3. Search within help works
4. Article pages load
5. Related articles shown
6. Contact support CTA visible

### Contact Form
7. Form displays correctly
8. Required fields validated
9. Category selection works
10. Submission succeeds
11. Confirmation shown
12. Email sent to support

### Ticket System
13. User can view tickets
14. Ticket history displays
15. Can reply to open ticket
16. Status updates shown

### Search
17. Help search returns results
18. No results shows suggestions
19. Search is fast

## Files to Create
- e2e/support/help-center.spec.ts
- e2e/support/contact-form.spec.ts
- e2e/support/tickets.spec.ts
- e2e/lib/support-helpers.ts

## Success Criteria
- Help center fully tested
- Contact form works
- User journey complete

## Logging Requirements
- Log search queries and results count
- Log contact form payload validation errors
- Capture screenshots for submission success and failure

## UX Improvements
- Ensure help search returns friendly suggestions when empty
- Contact CTA visible on every help article page
","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:25:14.598851892-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-12T11:27:52.853796122-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-12T11:27:52.853796122-05:00","close_reason":"E2E tests fully implemented: help-center.spec.ts (20+ tests for main page, categories, articles, navigation, accessibility), contact-form.spec.ts (25+ tests for form display, validation, submission, categories/priorities), tickets.spec.ts (20+ tests for ticket display, lookup, replies, mobile), and support-helpers.ts utilities.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-rbke","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-jpv6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:25:36.710149608-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-rbke","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-96v3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:25:36.840367499-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-rd99","title":"Document CLI-Premium integration architecture","description":"## Task
Document the integration architecture between the free CLI (jfp) and the premium SaaS backend.

## Documentation Sections

### 1. Authentication Flow
- Device code flow (RFC 8628) explanation
- Token storage and refresh
- Error handling

### 2. API Endpoints
- /api/cli/device-code - Initiate auth
- /api/cli/token - Exchange code for token
- /api/cli/sync - Sync library
- /api/cli/collections - Manage collections

### 3. Local Cache Structure
- ~/.jeffreysprompts/ directory layout
- credentials.json format
- library/ cache structure
- Sync metadata

### 4. Prompt Format Compatibility
- Free tier prompt format (TypeScript)
- Premium prompt format (database)
- Conversion between formats
- SKILL.md export format

### 5. Offline Mode
- What works offline
- Cache invalidation
- Conflict resolution

## Files to Create
- docs/cli-premium-integration.md
- docs/api-reference.md
- Update README.md with premium features section

## Success Criteria
- Clear documentation for contributors
- API contracts documented
- Cache format specified
- Troubleshooting guide included

## Cross-Repo Integration
- Premium device code flow: jeffreysprompts_premium-0o1
- Premium verification page: jeffreysprompts_premium-qdm
- Premium CLI auth page: jeffreysprompts_premium-mn0
- Premium CLI JWT/token generation: jeffreysprompts_premium-qnl
- Premium token refresh/revoke: jeffreysprompts_premium-0ve
- Premium CLI sync endpoints: jeffreysprompts_premium-67o","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T00:31:23.09441384-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T02:42:16.957424058-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-rd99","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-uw7z","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T02:44:52.838533775-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-rd99","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-hiff","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T02:45:12.029126352-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-rd99","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-wlg3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T02:45:29.926171438-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-rd99","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xzgq","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T02:45:45.072648583-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-rd99","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-akwo","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T02:54:20.526620963-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-rd99","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-bojj","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T13:04:36.038383066-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-reul","title":"E2E Tests: API Documentation Pages","description":"## Origin
Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-nyk6.

## Task
Create E2E tests for the API documentation pages.

## Test Scenarios
1. **Documentation Navigation**
   - Table of contents works
   - Section links work
   - Anchor links work
   - Search documentation works

2. **API Reference**
   - All endpoints documented
   - Request/response examples
   - Authentication section
   - Error codes documented

3. **Interactive Features**
   - Try it out (API explorer)
   - Copy code buttons work
   - Code language selection
   - Dark mode support

4. **Content Quality**
   - Code examples valid
   - Links not broken
   - Images load correctly
   - Mobile responsive

## Logging Requirements
- Log navigation events
- Log search queries
- Log copy actions
- Screenshot key pages

## Files to Create
- e2e/docs/navigation.spec.ts
- e2e/docs/api-reference.spec.ts
- e2e/docs/interactive.spec.ts

## Success Criteria
- Documentation accessible
- Examples work correctly
- Search is useful
- Mobile friendly
